title: Feature 5: Pinned Messages / Todos in Chat
description: New storage pattern (.moe/pins/{channelId}.json), new MCP tools (moe.chat_pin, moe.chat_unpin), WebSocket handlers, and UI in both VS Code (collapsible pinned section) and JetBrains (pinned panel at top).
definitionOfDone: PinEntry interface in schema.ts with messageId, pinnedBy, pinnedAt, done, doneAt
MCP tools moe.chat_pin and moe.chat_unpin registered and working
WebSocket: PIN_MESSAGE, UNPIN_MESSAGE, TOGGLE_PIN_DONE, GET_PINS handlers
VS Code: Collapsible pinned section at top of chat, pin icon on hover
JetBrains: Pinned panel at top of chat

implementationPlan.description: Schema: Add `PinEntry` interface to `packages/moe-daemon/src/types/schema.ts` after ChatChannel: `{ messageId: string; pinnedBy: string; pinnedAt: string; done: boolean; doneAt: string | null }`. Add `PIN_CREATED`, `PIN_REMOVED`, `PIN_TOGGLED` to `ACTIVITY_EVENT_TYPES` array. Add `PINS_UPDATED` to `StateChangeEvent` union in StateManager.ts with payload `{ channel: string; pins: PinEntry[] }`. Error handling: types enforce non-null constraints.
implementationPlan.note: Added PinEntry interface to schema. Added PIN_CREATED, PIN_REMOVED, PIN_TOGGLED to ACTIVITY_EVENT_TYPES. Added PINS_UPDATED to StateChangeEvent union. Added PinEntry import to StateManager.

implementationPlan.description: StateManager: Add pin storage methods. Storage: `.moe/pins/{channelId}.json` (JSON array of PinEntry). Add `getPinsFilePath(channelId)`, `readPins(channelId): PinEntry[]`, `writePins(channelId, pins)` private helpers. Add public methods: `pinMessage(channelId, messageId, pinnedBy)` — validates channel/message exist, checks not already pinned, appends to pins file; `unpinMessage(channelId, messageId)` — removes from array; `togglePinDone(channelId, messageId)` — toggles done flag + sets doneAt; `getPins(channelId): PinEntry[]`. Each emits PINS_UPDATED + logs activity. Error handling: file not found returns empty array.
implementationPlan.note: Added pin storage methods: getPinsFilePath, readPins, writePins (private), getPins, pinMessage, unpinMessage, togglePinDone (public). Storage at .moe/pins/{channelId}.json. Each method emits PINS_UPDATED and logs activity.

implementationPlan.description: MCP tools: Create `packages/moe-daemon/src/tools/chatPin.ts` with `moe.chat_pin { messageId, channel, workerId }` — validates params, calls `state.pinMessage()`. Create `packages/moe-daemon/src/tools/chatUnpin.ts` with `moe.chat_unpin { messageId, channel }` — calls `state.unpinMessage()`. Both follow existing tool patterns. Register in `index.ts`. Error handling: throw invalidInput for missing required params.
implementationPlan.note: Created chatPin.ts and chatUnpin.ts MCP tools following existing patterns. Both registered in index.ts.

implementationPlan.description: WebSocket + Init + FileWatcher: Add `PIN_MESSAGE`, `UNPIN_MESSAGE`, `TOGGLE_PIN_DONE`, `GET_PINS` to PluginMessage union and handler switch in WebSocketServer.ts. GET_PINS returns `state.getPins(channel)`. Add `'pins'` to dirs array in initProject.ts (line 52). Add `pins/*.json` pattern to FileWatcher.ts patterns array (line 34). Error handling: validate payloads, return ERROR for invalid requests.
implementationPlan.note: Added GET_PINS, PIN_MESSAGE, UNPIN_MESSAGE, TOGGLE_PIN_DONE WebSocket handlers. Added 'pins' to init dirs. Added pins/*.json to FileWatcher patterns.

implementationPlan.description: VS Code UI: Add pin support to ChatViewProvider.ts. Types: add `PinEntry` to moe.ts. Client: add `onPinsReceived` emitter + `requestPins(channel)` + `pinMessage/unpinMessage/togglePinDone` methods to MoeDaemonClient.ts. Webview: collapsible 'Pinned' section at top of messages area. Pin icon on message hover. Done pins show strikethrough. Toggle done on click. Request pins on channel switch. Error handling: empty pins section hidden.
implementationPlan.note: Added full pin support to VS Code extension: 4 new emitters (onPinsReceived, onPinCreated, onPinRemoved, onPinToggled), 4 outbound methods (requestPins, pinMessage, unpinMessage, togglePinDone), PINS/PIN_CREATED/PIN_REMOVED/PIN_TOGGLED handlers in message switch, dispose cleanup. ChatViewProvider: collapsible pinned section at top of messages area, pin icon on message hover, checkbox for done toggle with strikethrough, unpin X button, incremental pin event handling. Updated moe.ts types with all pin WebSocket message types.

implementationPlan.description: JetBrains UI: Add pin support to ChatPanel.kt. Model: add `PinEntry` data class to Models.kt + `parsePinEntry()` to MoeJson.kt. Service: add pin handlers + outbound methods to MoeProjectService.kt. UI: collapsible pinned panel at top of messagesPanel with pin entries. Pin button on message right-click context menu. Done pins show strikethrough. Error handling: null-safe pin operations.
implementationPlan.note: JetBrains pin support: PinEntry data class in Models.kt, parsePinEntry in MoeJson.kt. MoeProjectService: PINS/PIN_CREATED/PIN_REMOVED/PIN_TOGGLED handlers, requestPins/pinMessage/unpinMessage/togglePinDone outbound methods, 4 publish methods, MoeStateListener interface extended. ChatPanel: collapsible pinned panel at top with checkbox done toggle and strikethrough, right-click context menu on messages for pin/unpin, pins requested on channel switch. Also fixed daemon PluginMessage type to include pin WebSocket message types.

implementationPlan.description: Test and verify: Run `cd packages/moe-daemon && npm run build`, `cd moe-vscode && npm run compile`, `cd moe-jetbrains && ./gradlew buildPlugin`. Manual test: pin a message via MCP tool, verify it appears in pinned section, toggle done, unpin.
implementationPlan.note: Full build verification: daemon build OK, VS Code compile OK, JetBrains buildPlugin OK. All 293 daemon tests pass (16 test files). No compilation errors in any project.

comments.author: architect
comments.content: PRIORITY: User's primary IDE is PyCharm/JetBrains. Implement JetBrains pinned panel UI FIRST, then VS Code.
